title: Co-Immunoprecipitation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"hmzkm","text":"This is a protocol to analyze protein-protein interactions associated with mitochondria using co-immunoprecipitation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"mqzd3","text":"- RIPA buffer (Thermo Scientific 89900)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"h1pgx","text":"- Halt Protease inhibitor cocktail, PIC (Thermo Scientific 78429)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mk7dn","text":"- Primary antibodies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7dgvd","text":"- μMACS Protein A or G magnetic microbeads (Miltenyi Biotec 130-092-945 or 130-092-947)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kjwkt","text":"- μMACS columns (Miltenyi Biotec 130-042-701)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6ql9s","text":"- Magnetic rack","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ersy","text":"- 2x Laemmli buffer (Bio-Rad 1610737)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Resuspend 500 µg of mitochondrial lysate in 1 mL RIPA buffer containing a protease inhibitor cocktail (PIC).
Add 3 µL of primary antibody to the lysate and incubate at 4°C with agitation for 1 hour.
Add 100 µL of μMACS Protein A (for rabbit antibodies) or Protein G (for mouse antibodies) magnetic microbeads (Miltenyi).
Incubate at 4°C with agitation for 4 hours.
Pass the microbead-bound protein complexes through μMACS columns.
Wash columns twice with 1 mL of 0.1% RIPA buffer containing PIC.
Wash columns again with 1 mL of detergent-free RIPA buffer.
Elute proteins with 100 µL of 2x Laemmli buffer.
creator: Szu-Chi Liao
